intro.title: Reliability Testing
intro.description: Cars are harsh environments: heat, vibration, and daily plugging. Reliability testing helps you reduce the most expensive issues - returns, bad reviews, and warranty claims.

checks.title: Packaging drop tests
checks.description: Reduce transit damage and DOA issues.

highlight.title: Why Buyers Like This
highlight.description: Testing is not just for engineers - it's a risk-reduction tool for procurement. It gives you evidence to defend your brand.

primary.title: Ask for a Test Plan Recommendation
primary.description: Tell us your target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical test plan and next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Verify fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
